Strip_Summary: First-person POV of stickman hands in surgical gloves trembling under harsh overhead lamp. Operating table visible ahead.
Stickman surgeon's gloved hands gripping scalpel - perfectly steady. Iodine-stained basin foreground. Underground clinic setting.
Stickman surgeon standing over operating table. Overhead lamp humming. Cold metal instruments on tray. Basement clinic.
Bold white text on dark background: 'For money.'
Stickman surgeon in scrubs, gloves on, standing beside operating table. Faceless figure lying on table. Dim basement.
Young stickman medical student in white coat studying. Textbooks stacked. Anatomy diagrams on wall. Bright lecture hall.
Young stickman carrying heavy textbook through dormitory hallway. Roommate stickman nearby. Clean institutional corridors.

Close view of steady stickman hand holding scalpel. Senior surgeon observing. Hospital surgical suite.

Stickman lying awake in dark room looking at own fingers. Moonlight casting shadows. Small apartment bedroom.
Stickman sitting at kitchen table with bills spread out. Faceless spouse in background. Small apartment kitchen.
Stickman driving early morning to second clinic. Run-down strip mall clinic exterior. Dawn light.
Stickman at kitchen table opening bills. Same table for dinner. Faceless spouse turning away. Dim kitchen.

Stickman surgeon in white coat standing proudly in hospital corridor. Badge visible. Clean white walls.

Bold white text on dark background: 'First do no harm.'
Stickman standing in apartment looking at certificate. Determined posture. Warm but dim interior.
Bold white text on dark background: 'You are thirty-two.'

Stickman holding phone to ear. Old residency photo on shelf. Apartment interior.
Underground clinic interior - converted basement. Shelves outlines on walls. Clean floor. Real medical equipment. Dim lighting.
Stickman surgeon in scrubs (no badge) standing beside operating table. Surgical instruments laid out. Basement clinic.
Bold white text on dark background: 'You don't.'
Faceless colleague stickman explaining in underground clinic. Hand gesturing. Stickman surgeon listening. Basement setting.
Faceless thin-armed donor stickman signing form. Calloused hands visible. Basement prep room. Harsh fluorescent.
Stickman surgeon watching faceless donor sign paper. Disinfectant bottles on shelf. Basement clinic prep area.
Stickman surgeon adjusting lamp over operating table. Faceless donor lying down. Dimly lit basement clinic.

Stickman sitting alone in dark car. Dashboard clock. Empty parking lot. Distant gas station lights.
Stickman surgeon washing hands at basement sink. Looking at steady hands under running water. Dim lighting.
Stickman surgeon standing between two faceless patients - donor on left, recipient on right. Scale motif. Basement clinic.
Stickman surgeon standing still, looking down at wet hands. Quiet moment. Basement corridor dim lighting.
Stickman washing hands at small sink. Steady hands under water. Disinfectant soap dispenser. Basement washroom.
Young faceless female donor stickman walking barefoot into basement prep room. Stickman surgeon observing. Concrete floor.
Stickman surgeon's arm reaching with IV needle toward flinching faceless donor. Desaturated cold grey vignette.
Stickman surgeon pushing anesthesia syringe. Faceless donor going still on table. Harsh overhead lamp. Basement.
Stickman surgeon sitting alone after surgery. Head slightly bowed. Dark basement corridor. Single light.
Stickman surgeon performing repeated operations. Multiple surgical scenes layered. Clock hands spinning.
Stickman surgeon walking away from hospital building. Taking off badge. Sunset behind hospital. City street.
Stickman surgeon operating faster. Multiple instruments. Busier clinic. Calendar showing months passing.
Faceless heavy-build stickman in dark suit with gold rings standing in basement clinic doorway. Watching surgeon.
Bold white text on dark background: 'Instructions.'
Stickman surgeon standing alone. Memory bubble showing oath ceremony with crowd. Fading to grey. Cool blue wash.
Multiple faceless donors on gurneys - some sedated, some bruised. Stickman surgeon walking past. Busy basement clinic.
Stickman surgeon standing between gloves on table and scalpel. Frozen moment. Desaturated cold grey at edges.
Stickman surgeon at basement clinic entrance. Envelope on table. Returning again. Rain outside.
Bold white text on dark background: 'Your hands just cut.'
Faceless kidnap victim stickman on operating table. Bruised wrists. Rope marks visible. Harsh lamp.

Stickman surgeon standing in operating room. Buzzing overhead lamp. Faceless victim on table. Isolated moment.
Stickman surgeon's gloved hands operating. Steady on instrument. Blood-flecked scrubs. Harsh overhead light.
Stickman surgeon pausing mid-surgery - hand hovering. Chest area highlighted. Then hands continue. Grey vignette.
Bold white text on dark background: 'That is the worst part.'
Stickman surgeon's hands moving mechanically during surgery. Mind vs body split visual. Harsh operating light.

Stickman surgeon washing hands at sink. Same protocol - left over right, between fingers. Dim basement washroom.

Stickman blinking in break room. Lights and walls blurring momentarily. Vent humming overhead. Tray with food.
Stickman surgeon looking down at own hands. Same hands - memory flash of hospital gratitude vs current operating table. Warm amber fading to grey.
Stickman flexing fingers. Still precise. Still fast. Mechanical motion. Dim basement.
Bold white text on dark background: 'Everything else is gone.'
Stickman surgeon in scrubs, graying hair, hands trembling then steady on scalpel. Mirror of opening. Basement operating room.
Bold white text on dark background: 'You were a doctor.'
Stickman surgeon standing alone in empty basement operating room. Oath text fading like scar. Dim warm light.
Bold white text on dark background: 'The rest of you forgot.'
